examples: Please speed up or we'll be late.
We need to speed up the process.
The new software speeds up the workflow.
The medicine sped up his recovery.
Can you speed up the delivery?
We need to speed up production.
Production has sped up this month.
The car sped up on the highway.
She sped up to pass the truck.
They sped up the construction schedule.
example_translate: Новое программное обеспечение ускоряет рабочий процесс.
speed up.synonyms:
Ускоряться, увеличивать скорость - accelerate, hurry up, quicken
Ускорять (процесс, действие) - accelerate, expedite, hasten
